# daytona_revoke_api_key_for_user (Action)

Revokes a Daytona API key by name for a specific organization user. Daytona allows the authenticated user to revoke their own key; revoking another user's key requires organization owner access.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_revoke_api_key_for_user" "example" {
  config {
    user_id = "user-id"
    name    = "automation-key"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) API key name to revoke.
- `user_id` (String) Daytona user ID that owns the API key.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID` for this action. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
